label: content

ocr_findings.note: Mistral misread the '試験にはコレが出る！' callout as 'つしが出る！'. The garbled callout text did not leak into any structured or output entity. This is a known Mistral limitation on stylized callout boxes.

narrative: Two term entities (サービスデスク, エスカレーション) and two figure entities extracted. JP text for both definitions matches OCR faithfully. The misread callout 'つしが出る！' was correctly excluded from structured/output. No content dropout, no phantom entities, no garbled characters in released JSON.
